item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 7h GM Brett Veach believes Alohi Gilman can be similar to Tyrann Mathieu, Justin Reid for
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 7h GM Brett Veach believes Alohi Gilman can be similar to Tyrann Mathieu, Justin Reid for Chiefs: "When you had success -- you had a guy like the Badger and you had a guy like Justin Reid back there -- Alohi fits that bill"
https:// nfl.com/news/chiefs-gm -brett-veach-alohi-gilman-fits-that-mold-of-safeties-tyrann-mathieu-justin-reid?campaign=Twitter_atn … 2 2 13 12 mil

item.title: MoveTheSticks: Ian Rapoport reposteó Daniel Jeremiah @MoveTheSticks · 9h I was on the phone with a GM less than an hour ago running thr
item.description: Ian Rapoport reposteó Daniel Jeremiah @MoveTheSticks · 9h I was on the phone with a GM less than an hour ago running through top 10 scenarios. The way we had it going, we both said, “the bengals are screwed.” Well, not anymore. This trade makes a ton of sense for them. 140 584 6 mil 879 mil

item.title:
AdamSchefter: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 7h New York’s NFL teams now control 25% of the top 16 picks in Thursday night’s draft.
Th
item.description:
Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 7h New York’s NFL teams now control 25% of the top 16 picks in Thursday night’s draft.
The Giants are slated to pick 5th and 10th, the Jets 2nd and 16th. 146 179 2 mil 292 mil
